data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence of the required target bindings. The linked use case specifies the need for these bindings, but there is no supporting evidence that demonstrates their implementation or validation. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of target bindings by biz/location/resource/service/offer/queue/subject.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of target bindings.
